purpose: Example morning bootstrap display data for reviewing the safe start-of-day orchestration checklist without launching tasks or changing state.

morning_startup_checklist.expected_result: Working directory is the ACTIVE_REPO path for AI_OS.
morning_startup_checklist.notes: Display only. This example does not run the command.

morning_startup_checklist.expected_result: Operator sees current branch and uncommitted file list before any work.
morning_startup_checklist.notes: Review status before APPLY work, commit, or push decisions.

morning_startup_checklist.expected_result: Operator knows which packet, approval, validator, and checkpoint files are in scope.
morning_startup_checklist.notes: Use read-only display scripts only until an APPLY prompt is explicitly approved.

morning_startup_checklist.expected_result: No startup task, scheduled task, dashboard edit, broker, OANDA, API key, live trading, commit, or push is planned.
morning_startup_checklist.notes: Stop if requested work touches blocked paths or live execution.

repo_health_checks.expected_result: Branch and uncommitted files are visible to the operator.
repo_health_checks.stop_condition: Stop before commit or push unless separately approved.

repo_health_checks.expected_result: No whitespace errors in changed files.
repo_health_checks.stop_condition: Stop and fix scoped files if whitespace errors are reported.
Stop and fix scoped JSON if parsing fails.

repo_health_checks.expected_result: Morning bootstrap display prints checklist, repo health checks, and next safe action.
repo_health_checks.stop_condition: Stop if the display reports missing or invalid bootstrap data.

next_safe_action.action: Run the read-only morning bootstrap display and review git status before approving any separate APPLY, commit, or push.
next_safe_action.stop_condition: Stop if startup tasks, scheduled tasks, broker, OANDA, API keys, live trading, dashboard edits, commit, or push are requested without explicit approval.

safety_notes: No broker, OANDA, API keys, webhooks, real orders, or live trading.
No files are launched from this display.
No commit or push is allowed without a separate explicit prompt.
